Understand How Recognition Flows Across Your Organization

See participation patterns, engagement activity, and culture adoption across groups — without fabricated metrics or fake analytics.

Explore InsightsSee How It Works
WorkKudo — Group Insights
👥
EngineeringActive contributors this month
🎯
Product TeamRecognition campaign participation
🌱
People & CultureCulture initiative engagement

Organizations Struggle to Understand Participation and Engagement

HR leaders and managers often have no visibility into how recognition programs are actually being used across teams and departments.

Without this visibility, it's impossible to know which teams are thriving, which are disengaged, or how to improve culture initiatives over time.

1No visibility into which teams are actively participating
2Recognition gaps are invisible until they become retention issues
3Program effectiveness is difficult to measure without data
4Leadership lacks insight to make culture-driven decisions
📈 Group Engagement Insights
👥Engineering

Highest Participation This Quarter

"Engineering hit 91% participation in the recognition program — the highest of any department. This data helped us replicate their approach org-wide."

Fatima Al-HassanHead of HR
📊Product

Engagement Up 34% After Campaign

"After the appreciation campaign, Product team recognition activity jumped significantly. Group insights made that visible."

Raj MehtaCulture Program Manager
🔍Trend

Q3 vs Q2 Participation Trend

"Seeing participation by department over time helped us identify which teams were drifting and reach out proactively."

Yuki TanakaPeople Analytics Lead

See the Full Picture of Recognition Across Your Organization

Group Insights surfaces engagement patterns and participation trends across every team, department, and initiative.

1 / 6
👥

Group Participation Views

See how different teams and departments engage with recognition programs across a given period.

How It Works

01
🏗️

Set Up Programs

Launch recognition campaigns and culture initiatives across your organization.

02
👥

Employees Participate

Teams contribute, recognize each other, and engage with programs at their own pace.

03
📊

Insights Are Generated

WorkKudo automatically surfaces group participation patterns and engagement activity.

04
🔍

Take Action

Use insights to improve programs, support disengaged teams, and strengthen culture initiatives.

🏗️

Set Up Programs

Launch recognition campaigns and culture initiatives across your organization.

Use Cases

See how organizations put Group Insights to work.

🏢

Department Analysis

Understand engagement levels across different departments and organizational units.

📋

Engagement Reviews

Conduct quarterly reviews of recognition participation as part of HR culture reporting.

🎯

Recognition Campaigns

Track adoption and participation in company-wide recognition drives and appreciation months.

Why It Matters

🧠

Better Decision Making

Equip HR leaders and managers with real participation data to guide culture decisions.

👁️

Team Visibility

Surface which teams are thriving and which may be disengaged before issues become serious.

🌱

Culture Improvement

Use participation patterns to refine recognition programs and strengthen culture initiatives.

🎯

Participation Awareness

Understand engagement levels across your organization without manual surveys or reports.

⚡

Faster Action

Identify gaps quickly so HR teams can respond before engagement drops impact retention.

🔗

Organization Alignment

Ensure recognition efforts are reaching all teams consistently, not just the most vocal ones.
